reason: The diff successfully updates the lock file to support Vite 8 by upgrading vite from 7.1.3 to 8.0.0 across multiple package configurations, along with necessary dependency updates like lightningcss (1.30.1 to 1.32.0) and rolldown (1.0.0-rc.4 to 1.0.0-rc.9), which are legitimate dependency changes required for Vite 8 compatibility.
